changes: Eventide: Potency has been increased from 8,000-16,000 to 10,000-20,000.
Impalement: The time between action execution and effect activation has been shortened.
Salted Earth: The time between action execution and effect activation has been shortened.
Doton: Reduction to damage taken has been reduced from 25% to 20%.
Dokumori: The time between action execution and effect activation has been shortened.
Forked Raiju: The time between action execution and effect activation has been shortened.
Fleeting Raiju: The time between action execution and effect activation has been shortened.
First Generation: Potency has been increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
Second Generation: Potency has been increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
Third Generation: Potency has been increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
Fourth Generation: Potency has been increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
World-swallower: The time between action execution and effect activation has been shortened.
Full Metal Field: Potency has been increased from 8,000 to 10,000; Recast time has been reduced from 32 to 30 seconds.
Marksman's Spite: The time between action execution and effect activation has been shortened.

Burst: Potency has been increased from 12,000 to 15,000; Barrier strength has been increased from a heal potency of 12,000 to 15,000; The time between action execution and effect activation has been shortened.
Mountain Buster: Potency has been increased from 10,000 to 12,000; The time between action execution and effect activation has been shortened.
Slipstream: Additional effect that increases movement speed by 25% on allies now also applies to self.
Glare III: The text 'Action changes to Glare IV when under the effect of Sacred Sight' has been added.
Seraph Strike: The text 'Action changes to Glare IV upon execution' has been removed.
Afflatus Purgation: Healing over time potency of Temperance has been reduced from 6,000 to 4,000; The time between action execution and effect activation has been shortened.
Glare IV: Potency has been increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Summon Seraph: Recovery via healing actions granted by the effect Seraphic Illumination has been reduced from 20% to 10%.
Microcosmos: HP recovered at the time of execution has been reduced from a cure of 5,000 potency plus 25% of compiled damage to a cure of 4,000 potency plus 20% of compiled damage.
Gravity II: The time between action execution and effect activation has been shortened.
Oracle: The time between action execution and effect activation has been shortened.
Shield Smite: The time between action execution and effect activation has been shortened.
Intervene: The time between action execution and effect activation has been shortened.
